pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, verifier.py, and task prompt instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real multi-frame X-Ray Angiography DICOM sample (0002.DCM) downloaded from Rubo Medical. The target export path for the transformed image is exactly /home/ga/DICOM/exports/transformed_view.jpg, and the verifier expects the resulting JPEG to exceed 2048 bytes and structurally correlate (>0.4) with the mathematically correct 90-degree clockwise rotation and horizontal flip.
